creator: wollman@FreeBSD.org
text:
While editors/psgml builds under Emacs 24.x, it doesn't actually work, erroring out when psgml-mode is invoked because Emacs 24.x does not have a "make-local-hook" function.

There seems to be a version 1.4 of psgml-mode which is in Debian and does claim to work under Emacs 24, but I was not able to get it to build within the framework of the current port (I didn't try too hard); at a minimum our patches need to be regenerated and/or dropped.
